name: Analytics Engineering (OLAP, dbt, metrics layer)
description: 分析工程:OLAP、dbt、数据仓库与指标层建模

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['analytics','olap','data_warehouse','dbt','metrics_layer'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(dbt model|data warehouse|olap|star schema|snowflake schema|metrics layer|looker|cube\.js|incremental model|slowly changing dimension|columnar store)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
